{{Quote|Zeltrons: A humanoid race native to the planet Zeltros. They are distinguished by their crimson red skin and possess the unique ability to love others unconditionally.|An excerpt from the ''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species''{{'s}} entry on Zeltrons|<ref name="One of a Kind (comic)">{{CWACite|8|One of a Kind (comic story)}}</ref>}}
Commissioned by the [[Sentientologist|anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]] and written by the [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Plevitz]], the '''''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species''''' was a piece of reference literature that focused on a variety of [[Species/Legends|species]] from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Released before the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], ''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species'' featured an entry on the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species that were by nature carefree, fun-loving beings.

==Description==
{{Quote|While Zeltrons have little concern for military defense, they tend to keep themselves in peak physical condition.|An excerpt from ''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species''{{'s}} entry on Zeltrons|<ref name="One of a Kind (comic)" />}}
The ''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species'' was a piece of non-fiction reference literature that contained [[Sentientologist|anthropological]] information on different [[Species/Legends|species]] from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Released [[Time/Legends|sometime]] prior to the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="One of a Kind" /> which concluded in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the ''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species'' was written by the professional [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Plevitz]], who had been hired by<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Sentientologist|anthropologist]]<ref name="EGAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref> [[Mammon Hoole]] to do so.<ref name="CSWE" /> The reference literature included an entry on the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]], a carefree [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]], who were known for their [[red]] skin and ability to love other beings unreservedly.<ref name="One of a Kind" />

In the entry, Plevitz stated that Zeltrons could release potent [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromones]] and sense the emotions of other sentients. The entry noted that while the Zeltron species lacked concern for any military defense of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], they generally kept themselves physically fit, and thus could become fierce and violent [[Soldier/Legends|warriors]] if they found no other way to show their passion.<ref name="One of a Kind" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species'' was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[One of a Kind (comic story)|''One of a Kind'']]—published in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8]]'' on [[June 20]], [[2007]]—where the reference literature is quoted multiple times over the course of the comic's story. The ''Plevitz Essential Guide to Species'' was later mentioned in Plevitz's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published [[December 9]], [[2008]].
